source_concentration: 5 mL/L of 40% glucose stock; 2 g/L final D-glucose in broth as prepared from MEDIA-M1 page 1
100 mL/L of 10X M9 salts stock containing 60 g/L Na2HPO4; 6 g/L final in broth
100 mL/L of 10X M9 salts stock containing 30 g/L KH2PO4; 3 g/L final in broth
100 mL/L of 10X M9 salts stock containing 5 g/L NaCl; 0.5 g/L final in broth
100 mL/L of 10X M9 salts stock containing 10 g/L NH4Cl; 1 g/L final in broth
2 mL/L of 1 M MgSO4 stock; 2 mmol/L final in broth
0.1 mL/L of 1 M CaCl2 stock; 0.1 mmol/L final in broth; source page notes this is omitted for Pseudomonas
unresolved_fraction_note: Source recipe includes CaCl2 for the broth as stated, but the same page notes not to add CaCl2 for Pseudomonas.

source_concentration: 5 mL/L of 40% glucose stock; same chemically defined nutrient addition as M9 broth, added to agar medium after cooling per MEDIA-M1 page 1
100 mL/L of M9 salts stock in agar medium; stock contains 60 g/L Na2HPO4, giving the same defined phosphate-salt inventory carried from broth into agar
100 mL/L of M9 salts stock in agar medium; stock contains 30 g/L KH2PO4, giving the same defined phosphate-salt inventory carried from broth into agar
100 mL/L of M9 salts stock in agar medium; stock contains 5 g/L NaCl, giving the same defined salt inventory carried from broth into agar
100 mL/L of M9 salts stock in agar medium; stock contains 10 g/L NH4Cl, giving the same defined nitrogen-salt inventory carried from broth into agar
2 mL/L of 1 M MgSO4 stock; same chemically defined nutrient addition as M9 broth, added to agar medium after cooling per MEDIA-M1 page 1
0.1 mL/L of 1 M CaCl2 stock; same chemically defined nutrient addition as M9 broth, added to agar medium after cooling; source page notes this is omitted for Pseudomonas
unresolved_fraction_note: Source recipe includes CaCl2 for the agar medium as repeated from the broth block, but the same page notes not to add CaCl2 for Pseudomonas.

source_concentration: 20 g/L agar added as a solidifier in the M9 agar preparation
unresolved_fraction_note: Agar is retained as an unresolved solidifier / non-nutrient structural component; it is not decomposed, not assigned an exchange reaction, and not converted into GEM-ready nutrient rows without separate evidence.
